summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zomoto Tasks - Restaurant Task Management System with new task lifecycle features. All backend tests passed (21/21 - 100%). Frontend testing verified all key features including login for all roles, dashboard stats, task creation with time fields, task detail page with lifecycle actions, edit task modal, and delete task functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Status filter dropdown appears to select values but filtered results show all tasks instead of only filtered status. The filter UI is present but filtering logic may not be triggering correctly.

passed_tests: Dashboard displays correct stats (Total Tasks, In Progress, Completed, Verified, To Assign, To Verify) - SUCCESS
Create Task Modal with Task Type, Time Interval, Time Unit, Start Date/Time - SUCCESS
Task cards show time interval and time remaining/deadline - SUCCESS
Task detail page shows all time-related info (time_interval, allocated_datetime, deadline) - SUCCESS
Start task action changes status from PENDING to IN_PROGRESS - SUCCESS
Complete task requires proof photo upload (button disabled until proof uploaded) - SUCCESS
Verify task action (Manager/Owner only) changes status to VERIFIED - SUCCESS
Edit task functionality works correctly with time fields - SUCCESS
action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate task status filter not applying correctly in frontend (low priority - backend filtering works correctly)
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Task lifecycle (PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED → VERIFIED) fully functional. Time-bound tasks with time_interval, time_unit, allocated_datetime, and auto-calculated deadline working correctly. Proof photo upload required for task completion. Edit task modal includes all time fields. Delete task (soft delete) working. Minor issue: frontend status filter may not be applying correctly but backend filtering works fine.

task_lifecycle.NOT_COMPLETED_auto_trigger: Backend logic present for deadline exceeded

time_fields.time_interval: Working - Displayed in task cards and detail page

role_permissions.Owner: Can create, edit, delete, verify tasks
role_permissions.Manager: Can create, edit, delete, verify tasks
role_permissions.Staff: Can only start, upload proof, complete assigned tasks
